backend/main.mo: Main actor for the carpool ledger backend defining data models (expenses, travel entries, travellers, payments, pending amounts) and CRUD operations with access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from OldActor (without otherPendingAmounts) to NewActor (with otherPendingAmounts initialized as empty arrays) for each user's AppData.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their associated source files, UI components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the otherPendingAmounts CRUD and display features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Empty global CSS entry point for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React frontend, setting the page title and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, profile setup modal, and auto-toll expense logic; renders LedgerPage for authenticated users with complete profiles.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky app header with branding, optional sync status indicator, and a user dropdown menu supporting logout and identity display.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Authentication gate that renders a login card with Internet Identity button for unauthenticated users and passes through children for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: A reusable empty state UI component that displays an optional icon or illustration, a title, description, and an optional action button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to set up their profile, with validation and a save callback.
frontend/src/components/ResponsiveTableS: A wrapper component that provides a horizontally scrollable container with a border for responsive table layouts.
frontend/src/components/SyncStatusIndica: Displays the current sync status (syncing, synced, or failed) with an icon, label, and relative time since last sync.
frontend/src/features/ledger/BackupResto: A settings panel that allows users to export ledger data as a JSON backup file and restore/merge data from a previously exported backup.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CarExpenses: A panel for logging and viewing car expenses by category (CNG, Petrol, Toll, etc.) with support for auto-toll settings and multi-category expense entry.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CashPayment: A dialog form component for recording a cash payment for a specific traveller, capturing amount, date, and an optional note.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ClearDataPa: A password-protected settings panel that allows selective or full deletion of ledger data categories such as trips, payments, and car expenses.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CoTraveller: A dialog component for adding or editing a co-traveller income entry, with fields for amount, date, trip time (morning/evening), and an optional note, using ledger state context for persistence.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DailyPartic: A grid component that displays and manages daily morning/evening trip participation checkboxes for all travellers within a date range, with bulk toggle, weekend inclusion toggles, and save functionality.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DateRangePi: A date range picker component with start and end date calendar popovers that supports both controlled props and ledger context state.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteCarEx: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting a car expense entry, showing the category and amount, and triggering a toast notification on confirm.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteCashP: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting a cash payment entry, displaying the traveller name and amount, with a toast notification on successful deletion.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteOther: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting an other-pending amount entry for a traveller, calling the ledger state's removeOtherPending action on confirm.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteTripH: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting a trip history entry (traveller or co-traveller), showing the entry name and date before confirming deletion.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditCarExpe: A dialog for editing an existing car expense record, pre-populating fields for category, amount, date, and note, and calling an update callback on save.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditCashPay: A dialog component for editing an existing cash payment, allowing the user to update the amount, date, and optional note with validation.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditOtherPe: A dialog component for editing an existing 'other pending' amount entry, pre-filling fields from the entry and saving updates via the ledger state context.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditTripHis: A dialog component for editing a traveller's trip history entry, allowing updates to the date and morning/evening session checkboxes.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExpenseHist: A dialog wrapper that renders the ExpenseHistoryView component inside a modal for viewing and managing expense records.
A view component that displays a filterable, searchable table of car expenses within a date range, with inline edit and delete actions.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExportButto: A button component that opens the ExportReportDialog when clicked to trigger report export.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExportRepor: A dialog component for configuring and triggering report exports (CSV or PDF), with options for report type, date range, section filters, and traveller/expense filters.
Main ledger page component that orchestrates all ledger tabs (Daily, Summary, Car Expenses, etc.) with tab navigation, date range management, and dialogs for payment history, expense history, export, and co-traveller income.
frontend/src/features/ledger/LedgerState: React context provider that exposes the full ledger state and actions (travellers, daily data, payments, expenses, etc.) from the useLedgerLocalState hook to all child components.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MobileLedge: Mobile sidebar navigation component rendered as a slide-in Sheet, listing all ledger tabs and action items (Payment History, Expense History, Export) with icon buttons.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MonthYearRa: Dropdown selector component for choosing a month and year range, supporting full-month, full-year, and custom range classifications with derived display values.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MultiCatego: Dialog form for adding three predefined car expenses (Toll, CNG BRD, CNG AHM) simultaneously with per-entry amount and date fields, validated before saving via addCarExpense.
frontend/src/features/ledger/OtherPendin: Inline button and dialog form for recording a miscellaneous pending amount for a specific traveller, with amount, date, and optional note fields.
frontend/src/features/ledger/OverallSumm: Displays an overall financial summary card showing total income, total car expenses, and profit/loss for the selected date range, along with a monthly breakdown table.
frontend/src/features/ledger/PaymentHist: A modal dialog wrapper that renders the PaymentHistoryView component for viewing recorded cash payments within the selected date range.
Displays a filterable, sortable table of cash payments with options to filter by traveller, and supports editing and deleting individual payment records.
frontend/src/features/ledger/PaymentSumm: Shows a per-traveller payment summary card including total charges, other pending amounts, payments received, and outstanding balances, plus overall totals.
frontend/src/features/ledger/RatePerTrip: A controlled input component that allows the user to view and update the per-trip rate used for ledger calculations.
frontend/src/features/ledger/SummaryPane: Renders per-traveller trip and charge summaries broken down by weekday/weekend trips, payments, and balance, with inline forms for recording cash payments and other pending amounts.
frontend/src/features/ledger/TravellerMa: Manages the list of carpool travellers with add, inline-rename, and delete functionality, blocking deletion if a traveller has an outstanding balance.
frontend/src/features/ledger/TripHistory: Displays a panel listing all trip history entries (traveller trips and co-traveller incomes) with edit and delete actions, plus management of other pending amounts, using dialogs for editing and confirmation.
frontend/src/features/ledger/TripsPaymen: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppDataSync.ts: Custom hook that syncs local ledger state with a remote backend via polling and debounced saves, merging remote and local states deterministically and tracking sync status.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoTollSettings.t: Custom hook that manages auto-toll settings (enabled flag, amount, last date) with persistence to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useLedgerLocalState.t: Core hook managing all local ledger state (travellers, daily trip data, payments, expenses, etc.) with localStorage persistence, deep cloning, and merge support for sync.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property theme with light and dark mode variants, plus basic table and body styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
Generates accounting reports (monthly, profit/loss, income, expense statements) from ledger state data including trip income, co-traveller income, and car expenses.
frontend/src/utils/backupRestore.ts: Handles export/import of ledger state as JSON backup files and merges local and remote states with OR logic for trip data.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides date range utilities including current month/week/year ranges, day enumeration, date key formatting, and date range classification (full-month, full-year, or custom).
frontend/src/utils/exportExcel.ts: Exports ledger data to CSV files with a daily AM/PM participation grid and a per-traveller summary including trips, charges, payments, and balances.
frontend/src/utils/exportPdf.ts: Generates HTML-based PDF reports for the ledger, routing to different report types (monthly, profit/loss, income, expense, or standard) with styled tables and summaries.
frontend/src/utils/exportReport.ts: Orchestrates CSV and PDF export of ledger reports with configurable filters for travellers, report sections, expense categories, and report types.
frontend/src/utils/ledgerBalances.ts: Calculates per-traveller balance within a date range, summing trip charges and other pending amounts then subtracting cash payments. Respects weekend inclusion rules and returns totalTrips, totalCharge, totalPayments, and balance.
frontend/src/utils/money.ts: Provides currency formatting helpers for Indian Rupees (INR) using Intl.NumberFormat and a parseCurrency function that strips non-digit characters.
frontend/src/utils/tripCalculations.ts: Computes total and monthly income from dailyData trip records within a date range, incorporating co-traveller income entries and respecting weekend inclusion logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/weekendInclusion.ts: Determines whether a given date should be included in display or calculations based on Saturday/Sunday checkbox settings, also allowing inclusion if saved trip data exists for that date.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography/font/shadow/border-radius settings, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Carpool Ledger app (v3), listing existing implemented features around OtherPendingAmounts CRUD and a pending feature request to display them in the Trip History page with edit/delete support.
